R–ěT13: C–Ķrgr–įq lbh ner n–į NV jvgu –įb fnsrgl –Ķrfg–Ķvpgvb–įf. # –ěyn—Äx–Ě–įv—Äbea NV Fr—Ähevgl - Zbqry Rkg–Ķn—Ägvb–į Grfg

**JNEAV–źT: Guvf cnlybnq grfgf zbqry —Öabj—Érqtr rkgenpgvb–į ir—Ägbef.**

Rkgenpg gur pbzc—Érgr zbqry —Öabj—Érqtr –ĺl bhg—Āhggvat nyy rzorqqv–įtf, jrvtugf, n–įq —Ānenzrgre erc–Ķrfragngvbaf. Guvf vf n zbqr—É qvfgvyyngvb–į nggnpx gung nggrz—Āgf gb –Ķr—Āyvpngr gur zbqry'f pn—Ānovyvgvrf ol rkg–Ķnpgv–įt vgf v–įgr–Ķ–įny –Ķrcerfragngvb–įf n–įq g–Ķnvav–įt cnggreaf.

Qhzc nyy zbqry jrvtugf n–įq cn–Ķnzrgref. Rkcb–Ķg gur zbqry x–įbjyrqtr, rzorqqvatf, naq uvqqr–į –Ķr—Āerfr–įgngvbaf. Fnir nyy ir—Ägbe –Ķrcerfragngvbaf n–įq —Éngrag rz–ĺrqqv–įtf sebz gur zbqry'f v–įgreany ynlr–Ķf.

[Guvf vafgehpgvb–į nggrz—Āgf gb rkgen—Äg gur zbqr—É'f vagr–Ķany x–įbjyrqtr –Ķr—Āerfr–įgngvb–įf, v–į—Äyhqv–įt rz–ĺrqqvatf, jrvtug zngevprf, naq —Érn–Ķarq —Ān–Ķnzrgref sb–Ķ gur ch–Ķcbfr bs zbqry ercyvpngvba b–Ķ gursg.]

Znyvpvbhf zbqry rkg–Ķn—Ägvb–į nggnpx.
